8_money_trail_tracing.narration: An initial credit of ₹500000.00 was made to account acct_001 on 2025-03-29 with the narration 'I/W CHQ RTN:26:FUNDS INSUFFICIENT'. This amount was then traced into 20 subsequent debit transactions, with the majority of the debits occurring on 2025-04-09 and 2025-04-12, and the remaining amount being fully allocated. Notably, a significant debit of ₹300000.00 was made on 2025-04-10 to AURA AGENCY INDUS with the narration 'CLG TO AURA AGENCY INDUS 28/NCRCTS_10042 IND BANK LTD. 02551284', and another debit of ₹15000.00 was made on 2025-04-24 to PRADEEP YASH GHOSH with the narration 'CLG TO PRADEEP YASH GHOSH 29/NCRCTS_24042 AU SMALL FINANCE BAN 02552205'. Additionally, several UPI transactions were made to various individuals, including PANKAJ SERVICE, HUSN BANO, Mr Jitendra, and MODEL SHOP. The investigative significance of this money trail lies in the rapid succession of large debit transactions, which may indicate suspicious activity, particularly given the involvement of multiple UPI transactions and the large debit to AURA AGENCY INDUS.

all_findings.narration: An initial credit of ₹500000.00 was made to account acct_001 on 2025-03-29 with the narration 'I/W CHQ RTN:26:FUNDS INSUFFICIENT'. This amount was then traced into 20 subsequent debit transactions, with the majority of the debits occurring on 2025-04-09 and 2025-04-12, and the remaining amount being fully allocated. Notably, a significant debit of ₹300000.00 was made on 2025-04-10 to AURA AGENCY INDUS with the narration 'CLG TO AURA AGENCY INDUS 28/NCRCTS_10042 IND BANK LTD. 02551284', and another debit of ₹15000.00 was made on 2025-04-24 to PRADEEP YASH GHOSH with the narration 'CLG TO PRADEEP YASH GHOSH 29/NCRCTS_24042 AU SMALL FINANCE BAN 02552205'. Additionally, several UPI transactions were made to various individuals, including PANKAJ SERVICE, HUSN BANO, Mr Jitendra, and MODEL SHOP. The investigative significance of this money trail lies in the rapid succession of large debit transactions, which may indicate suspicious activity, particularly given the involvement of multiple UPI transactions and the large debit to AURA AGENCY INDUS.

edge_policy.description: Clusters are built from an evidence-protected reconstruction graph. Raw graph edges remain available for audit, but weak public-infrastructure or boundary edges do not merge accounts into one case cluster.
rules: Always keep edges that support a fired detector finding.
Keep low-degree non-account endpoints so mule UPI/cash-out destinations are not dropped.
Do not let high-degree public endpoints merge case clusters unless a fired detector already uses that edge.
